title: oxalis tenerrima
intro: Oxalis tenerrima, also known as the small-flowered wood-sorrel or delicate wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and skin problems due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oxalis tenerrima include its potential to aid in the relief of diarrhea, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Oxalis tenerrima is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and potential uses.
